channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped Xmas tree + bike tyre on Digby Cres, 3rd March
item.description:
Dumped Xmas tree + bike tyre on Digby Cres - reported once already, ticket was closed without it being removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Digby Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame on pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
Friern Road behind St Anthony’s schooll. Remove soonest—already reported once!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 235, Friern Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Umber 26 is using cones to save at least 3 parking spaces, 3rd March
item.description:
Number 26 is using cones to save 3 parking spaces. This has been going on for at least a week. They also approach cars who move the cones sayythey cannot park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arran Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Discarded mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard Box Dumped Outside Number 46 Danby Street, 3rd March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a cardboard box outside number 46 Danby Street. It's been there for one week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Danby Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass & Bench area 129 Stamford Hill N16 needs to be cleaned, 3rd March
item.description:
This area needs to cleaned cardboard, bread, litter bin overflowing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outdated council notice, 3rd March
item.description:
On lamp post
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9b, Upper Wickham Lane, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Outdated council notice, 3rd March
item.description:
On no uturn sign post
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Wickham Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Directly behind bus stop, putting passengers in danger, 3rd March
item.description:
This car consistently parks behind laird bus stop putting passengers in danger as they have to stand in the road to be seen to catch bus 88. This has been happening for 2 days to my knowledge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laird Avenue, Little Thurrock, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on bus stop, 3rd March
item.description:
Pothole has been here for a while and is growing, on hasluck gardens bus stop opposite 76 lyonsdown road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76, Lyonsdown Road, New Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover with pot hole on Bromley Road same side as Oldstead Rd BR1 5RJ at start of second bus lane opposite Peter Pan Park 359 Bromley Rd, 3rd March
item.description:
Drain cover with pot hole on Bromley Road same side as Oldstead Rd BR1 5RJ at start of second bus lane opposite Peter Pan Park 359 Bromley Rd it was poorly fixed by TFL with a bit of tarmac in early Feb but the same issue has arose again. It’s an accident waiting to occur as cars keep trying to avoid it causing swerving into the opposite direction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 3rd March
item.description:
Clear from pictures. I know who did it too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Minster Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 3rd March
item.description:
Again rubbish notice needs to be put up to remind people not to dump there rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downham Way, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover still noisy after being fixed!, 3rd March
item.description:
Manhole cover that was fixed and is now worse/noisier than before - issue not resolved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palmerston Road, Palmers Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van fly tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Dumping rubbish next to bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are 3 large street lights not working along prioress street - causing safety issues, 3rd March
item.description:
Three council lights are not working along prioress street (SE1 4TE) London . Please can someone come and fix the bulbs- as it’s causing real Safety concerns for anyone living on this street/ but also pedestrians.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prioress Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole exposed outside 1b, 3rd March
item.description:
Pothole exposed now outside 1b Elm Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole increases by the day, 3rd March
item.description:
This pothole appears every year and despite repeated reporting this year no repairs actions. It is heavily used being a bus route for 8 buses serving the area and lorries.The speed limit camera has been removed due to major road work going on this stretch of road and strong and continuous vibrations is felt with each and every speeding buses over the pothole. All of which is unnerving and effecting sleep. Urgent repairs are needed please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Streatham Hill, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow Barriers, 3rd March
item.description:
About 4/5 large plastic yellow work site barriers seem to have been left around this location after works (?). They are propped up by a street light column, or they were, and have been there for some time now. Clearly forgotten.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmerside Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping Trolley, 3rd March
item.description:
1 shopping trolley sitting in this area. Possibly the same one I reported recently?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 233-235, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
